'''Corphelion''' was an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] asteroid rimward of [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]] with numerous holiday resorts where honeymooners and tourists went to see the system's beautiful [[Corphelion Comets|comets]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> It was the sight of the [[Sith incursion at Corphelion|Battle of Corphelion]] during the [[New Sith Wars]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Corphelion later fell under control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Planet-stub}}
